meaning: adj.未认可(或批准)的 未通过的
examples: But today, unsanctioned tinkerers have more power than ever.
It found that many of its workers had unsanctioned servers under their desks.
His friends and neighbors say that in his 23 years of unsanctioned service, he has never been more appreciated.
The Tower Bridge twitter bot was, he admits, completely unsanctioned by the owners of the bridge.
Indian Premier League commissioner Lalit Modi has said any team fielding unsanctioned ICL players will be excluded from the autumn tournament.
